entries.claim_text: OU + weekday-conditional (alternative) mean G = 3.2 across 17 funds
entries._note: G=3.2 is the goodness-of-fit G-stat of simulated alternative-model paths vs empirical weekday-of-max, NOT the LRT statistic (LR_weekday~16). Requires adding alternative-model simulation to 13_baseline_simulation.py. Deferred until that simulation path is implemented.

entries.claim_text: OU classical: 17/17 reject at p < 0.05 (paper summary row)
